N.description: Size of the grid (number of rows and columns)

h.description: 1 if (i,j) is the unique hole in row i and column j, 0 otherwise

x.description: 1 if row i, columns a through b are covered by the same tile, 0 otherwise

s.description: 1 if a tile starts at row i for column interval (a,b), 0 otherwise

t.description: 1 if a tile ends at row i for column interval (a,b), 0 otherwise

constraints.description: Each row contains exactly one hole.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(h[i, j] for j in range(N)) == 1 for i in range(N))

constraints.description: Each column contains exactly one hole.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(h[i, j] for i in range(N)) == 1 for j in range(N))

constraints.description: Each cell is either a hole or covered by exactly one tile interval.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{(a,b) \in I:\, a \le j \le b} x_i^{ab} + h_{ij} = 1 \quad \forall i,j \in \{0,\dots,N-1\}

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(x[i, a, b] for (a, b) in intervals if a <= j <= b) + h[i, j] == 1 for i in range(N) for j in range(N))

constraints.description: Top-row flow: a tile covering interval (a,b) in row 0 must start there.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(x[0, a, b] - s[0, a, b] == 0 for (a, b) in intervals)

constraints.description: Mid-row flow: tile coverage at row i equals coverage from previous row plus new starts minus ends.
constraints.formulation: x_i^{ab} - x_{i-1}^{ab} - s_i^{ab} + t_{i-1}^{ab} = 0 \quad \forall i \in \{1,\dots,N-1\},\; \forall (a,b) \in I

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(x[i, a, b] - x[i-1, a, b] - s[i, a, b] + t[i-1, a, b] == 0 for i in range(1, N) for (a, b) in intervals)

constraints.description: Bottom-row flow: a tile covering interval (a,b) in the last row must end there.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(x[N-1, a, b] - t[N-1, a, b] == 0 for (a, b) in intervals)

constraints.description: Top-Row Vertical Break (V1 EC3): a hole in row 0 forces a strip starting in row 1 to cover the same column (only when N≥2).
constraints.formulation: h_{0,j} \le \sum_{(a,b) \in I:\, a \le j \le b} s_1^{ab} \quad \forall j \in \{0,\dots,N-1\},\; N \ge 2

code.gurobipy: if N >= 2: model.addConstrs(h[0, j] <= gp.quicksum(s[1, a, b] for (a, b) in intervals if a <= j <= b) for j in range(N))

objective.description: Minimize the total number of rectangular tiles used.

code.gurobipy: model.setObjective(gp.quicksum(s[i, a, b] for i in range(N) for (a, b) in intervals), GRB.MINIMIZE)
